items.name: Magical Umbrella
items.description: Float away with this magical umbrella.  Click to do a twirling trick. Jump while moving to go farther. Click a lot to make it float away! (does not make the player fly)

items.name: Fluffy Unicorn
items.description: I thought unicorns were more ... fluffy.

items.name: Witches Brew
items.description: Do the Brew! Shipped direct from the Haunted Hill soda company. Warning: may cause freakish deformities. Warning: may contain actual witches.

items.name: Dragon's Flame Sword
items.description: Are you the dragon or the dragon slayer?  Use the special key 'E', 'Q', 'G', 'T', 'L' to emit ice-fire from your left arm and throw fire balls at your foes.  If hit, your enemy will be set aflame and and will take 70 damage.

items.name: From the Vault: Kawaii Cat
items.description: From the vault of interns past, ROBLOX brings you - this kawaii cat! Rukiryo's cat will follow you around and listen to your commands. You can tell it to follow and to stay. There's also a special word to make it evolve. Will you find it?

items.name: Arctic Fox Tail
items.description: Wear this arctic fox tail and spin to hit your enemies and deal 22.5 damage per hit.

items.name: Tom's Beans
items.description: Inspired by an advertisement for Apocalypse Rising, a popular ROBLOX survival game, this tin of beans slowly refills 80% of your health. Plus, it gives you a special face decal when chowing down.

items.name: From the Vault: Alpaca Plushie
items.description: From the vault of interns past, ROBLOX brings you - this giant alpaca! Defaultio's alpaca makes many animal noises and when you drop it, it grows intimidatingly large.

items.name: Cobalt Interplanetary Light Sword
items.description: Its power other planetary, its glow otherworldly...

items.name: Spartan Sword
items.description: Real Spartans actually hate it when other people argue over what is and isn't Sparta.

items.name: Ye Olde Fire Breath Potion
items.description: Guzzle this down to shoot flames out of your mouth.  What an impressive party trick!

items.name: Noir Periastron Psi
items.description: The sword men use to fight unendurable black evil crawling with rabid dinosaurs... in space. Users who redeemed two ROBLOX cards from Walmart between June 27th and July 31st were awarded this sword. This is no longer earnable!

items.name: Grapple Hook
items.description: Seize the day (and pretty much anything else you want to seize) with this grappling gun.

items.name: US Military Top Secret Experimental Jetpack
items.description: "WHO GOT GREEN PAINT ON THIS THING!!! THIS IS GOING TO COST THE TAXPAYERS SEVEN BILLION DOLLARS!!!!"

items.name: Spray Paint
items.description: Spray paint your favorite decals all over the place!

items.name: Crimson Periastron Mu
items.description: This sword men use to fight angry narwhals... in space.

items.name: ROBLOX Classic Brigand's Sword
items.description: Stand and deliver! Does moderate damage and has a special Lunge attack (double click) that increases reach and damage. This is the first gear item ever published.

items.name: Azure Periastron Alpha
items.description: Only when two stars are at their closest point, can the material for this sword be collected, so they are extremely rare, and depending on which stars are orbiting one another they are different colors.  One thing is sure, they spell doom for anyone who comes near. First in a series!

items.name: Spec Alpha Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: This sword biografts to your character amps your jumping capabilities. Double click and jump at the same time to superjump. Also, if you get close to anyone, you will positively wreck them. Yes, the future is a dangerous place.

items.name: Ivory Periastron
items.description: The sword men use to fight hippos covered in poisonous snakes... in space.

items.name: ROBLOX Portable Game System (RPGS)
items.description:
A 2d game in a 3d game?  You betcha!  Controls - : "d" is forward
 "a" is backward
 "w" is jump
 "left click" is shoot

items.name: Elven Blade of Glory
items.description: Rumored to bring glory to all who fight with it, the Elven Blade of Glory assures you a victory against even the toughest of opponents.

items.name: Donut Delivery Moped
items.description: This stylish pink delivery vehicle will take you anywhere you want to go.  Click to eat some of your donut inventory.

items.name: Dracovin Spell Book
items.description: Dracovin's spells are world renowned for their force and accuracy.  4 of his spells can be yours today!

items.name: Zombie Staff
items.description: ZOMG - Zombies!!  This staff summons 5 zombies to do your bidding.

items.name: Bamboo Katana
items.description: Clack clack watch your back.

items.name: Winged Magical Staff
items.description: The perfect tool for fighting evil in the daylight or moonlight. Double jump to fly.  Control using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys. Click to shoot neon pink orbs at your enemies!

items.name: Dark Spellbook of the Forgotten
items.description: Learn to cast one of the following spells - The Orb of Onica, The Spikes of Speicla or The Freeze of Fontican.

items.name: Punk Wrist Cuff
items.description: This extreme wrist cuff instantly transforms you to a tough guy with a cool mohawk and sweet rock moves... mostly head banging.

items.name: Dual Illumina
items.description: Light and deadly- twice as deadly as a single Illumina!  This item came out of the Coolest Gift on December 21st, 2012.
